children.name: api
api/specs/analytics.spec.ts
GET /api/analytics/summary
should return analytics summary for the authenticated user
should return correct total workout count matching seeded data
should return a workout-by-type breakdown
should include weekly breakdown data
should return accurate average duration calculation
Analytics Authorization
should return 401 when accessing analytics without a token
should return 401 when accessing analytics with an expired token
api/specs/auth.spec.ts
POST /api/auth/login
should return 200 and a JWT token for valid credentials
should return 401 when the email does not exist
should return 401 when the password is incorrect
should return 400 when email or password is missing
POST /api/auth/register
should return 201 and a JWT token for a new user
should return 409 when registering with an existing email
should return 400 when required fields are missing
Token Validation
should reject requests with an invalid token
should reject requests with no token
should accept requests with a valid token obtained from login
api/specs/contract.spec.ts
Login Response Contract
should match the LoginResponse schema on successful login
should match the LoginResponse schema on successful registration
Error Response Contract
should match the error schema on 401 response
should match the error schema on 409 response
Workout Response Contract
should match the workout schema for a created workout
should return an array conforming to the workout list schema
should persist exerciseType from the allowed enum values
should persist durationMinutes within the valid range (1-1440)
Profile Response Contract
should match the user profile schema
should NOT expose the passwordHash field in the profile response
api/specs/workouts.spec.ts
GET /api/workouts
should return a list of workouts for the authenticated user
should return workouts with all required fields
should return 401 when no auth token is provided
POST /api/workouts
should create a new workout and return it with an id
should persist the workout so it appears in the list
should return 401 when creating without authentication
PUT /api/workouts/:id
should update a workout when given valid data
should return 401 when updating without authentication
DELETE /api/workouts/:id
should delete a workout and return 200
should no longer return the deleted workout in the list
should return 401 when deleting without authentication
Workout Filtering
should return only the requested user's workouts when filtering by userId
should return workouts ordered newest first
Workout Authorization Scope
should only return workouts belonging to the authenticated user
web-mobile-chrome
e2e-web/specs/login.spec.ts
Successful Login
should store an auth token in localStorage after login
should redirect to dashboard after entering valid credentials
Invalid Credentials
should show an error message when email does not exist
should show an error message when password is wrong
should NOT redirect to dashboard on failed login
Empty Field Validation
should disable the login button when both fields are empty
should disable the login button when only email is filled
should disable the login button when only password is filled
should enable the login button when both fields are filled
Logout
should clear the auth token and return to login page on logout
e2e-web/specs/navigation.spec.ts
Tab Navigation
should navigate to Workouts tab when tapped
should navigate to Profile tab when tapped
should navigate to History tab when tapped
should highlight the active tab with visual indication
Deep Linking
should load the workouts page directly via URL
should load the profile page directly via URL
should redirect unauthenticated users to login
Back Button
should return to the previous page when browser back is pressed
should handle Ionic back button if present
e2e-web/specs/responsive.spec.ts
Mobile Viewport
should render the login card within the mobile viewport without horizontal scroll
should display all login form elements on mobile
should complete full login flow on mobile viewport
Tablet Viewport
should render the login page correctly on tablet
should display form inputs with adequate touch target size on tablet
should complete full login flow on tablet viewport
Landscape Orientation
should render the login page in landscape without layout breakage
should allow scrolling to reach the login button in landscape if needed
should complete full login flow in landscape orientation
e2e-web/specs/workouts.spec.ts
Workout List
should display a list of workouts for the authenticated user
should show workout details including exercise type and duration
Add Workout
should navigate to the add workout form when clicking the add button
should create a new workout when the form is filled and submitted
should keep the submit button disabled while required fields are empty
Edit Workout
should allow editing a workout by clicking on it in the list
Delete Workout
should remove a workout from the list when deleted
Filter Workouts
should filter workouts when a search term is entered
should show all workouts when the search is cleared
